data.title: BNB price seen at $620.89, RSI 31.12 shows oversold state. Technical analysis hints at $635-$650 target by March.
data.description: The current trading price of the cryptocurrency Binance Coin (BNB) stands at $620.89, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 31.12, indicating that the asset is in oversold territory. Analysts using technical analysis anticipate that BNB may aim for resistance levels between $635 and $650 in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: ETH price aims $2,200 recovery after hitting $2,019; $1,912 critical support level for bullish trend.
data.description: The current price of Ethereum is $2,019, showing neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicators. Technical analysis indicates a short-term target of $2,200 if resistance is surpassed; however, it highlights the importance of the $1,912 support level for bullish momentum.

data.title: New Earth Resources uses high-res airborne geophysical techniques for rare earth element exploration in Red Wine project.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 18, 2026, New Earth Resources Corp. (CSE: EATH) revealed that integrated high-resolution airborne geophysical data shows priority zones for targeted rare earth element exploration at the Red Wine Rare Earth Elements (REE) project in Northwest Newfoundland and Labrador in central Labrador region. This geophysical data includes Magnetic+Radiometric information. The project is expected to enhance exploration efforts for rare earth elements.

data.title: BTC could hit $72K by March 2026 in a consolidation phase, pending break above key resistance at $69,600.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently in a neutral consolidation phase based on its technical indicators, with a potential to reach $72,000 by March if it can surpass key resistance levels currently set at $69,600. This prediction is based on the analysis of BTC price trend.

data.title: NICT showcases Beyond 5G/6G technologies at MWC Barcelona 2026; event from March 2-5 at Hall 6, Stand F54, highlighting Japan's leadership.
data.description: At Mobile World Congress (MWC) Barcelona 2026, the National Institute of Information and Communications Technology (NICT) of Japan, a prominent research organization in the field, revealed plans to showcase its innovations at Hall 6, Stand F54 from March 2–5, 2026. NICT's participation emphasizes Japan's pioneering role in Beyond 5G and 6G research and development endeavors, aiming to overcome the constraints of existing mobile networks.

data.title: Rudholm Group introduces Rudholm Compliance Portal to aid apparel brands in navigating global regulations easier.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Stockholm, Rudholm Group introduced the Rudholm Compliance Portal, a digital platform aimed at simplifying and enhancing compliance management in the apparel sector. This move comes amid increasing regulations within the industry. The portal seeks to provide clarity and ease in managing compliance for apparel brands in light of the ever-evolving regulatory landscape. This initiative reflects a response to the challenges faced by the industry and underscores Rudholm Group's commitment to addressing compliance issues.

data.title: Indonesia's MDI Ventures aims to unlock portfolio value by reinforcing partnerships and standards. Jakarta, Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: A venture capital firm supported by Telkom is enhancing collaborations across various industries and ensuring adherence to regulations to drive substantial expansion within Indonesia's government-affiliated network. Taking place in Jakarta, Indonesia, on February 18, 2026, the firm has made investments in the AI, cybersecurity, and blockchain fields, aiming to foster significant growth in its portfolio.

data.title: Sobi Capital Markets Day 2026 aims to reach SEK 55bn revenue by 2030, bringing new ideas to life.
data.description: Sobi® (STO: SOBI) is currently holding its Capital Markets Day in Stockholm on February 18, 2026, with senior management sharing insights on the company's strategy. The focus is on achieving a revenue target of SEK 55bn by 2030. This initiative is part of building a strong and enduring foundation for the company's future growth.

data.title: Ether bulls aim for $2.5K on the back of staking ETF launch, RWA growth, showing increasing investor interest.
data.description: An increasing number of major endowments are embracing Ether, with a significant shift in capital towards the cryptocurrency. BlackRock has recently introduced a staking exchange-traded fund (ETF) for Ether. Additionally, Ethereum's stronghold on real-world assets is becoming more prominent, capturing the interest of traditional finance (TradFi) investors. This trend underscores the growing popularity and acceptance of Ether in the financial landscape.
